task.title: Link UX Gremlin evidence artifacts in reports
task.goal: Copy Playwright evidence attachments into .agent/evidence during UX Gremlin ingest and render linked, data-rich Markdown and static HTML reports.
task.scope: Only the ux-gremlin plugin reporting, ingest, results schema, examples, docs, tests, package metadata, and local guardrail artifacts.
non_goals: Do not add remote artifact upload or external report hosting.
Do not add JavaScript or remote assets to the HTML report.
Do not change generated Playwright test semantics beyond evidence reporting support.
Do not modify unrelated plugins or hand-edit marketplace.json.

assumptions.statement: UX Gremlin report and ingest behavior is centralized in one Node ESM script, so evidence copying and report linking can be implemented without introducing a new runtime or dependency.
assumptions.verification_method: Read the plugin package metadata and ux-gremlin command script.
evidence: plugins/ux-gremlin/package.json exposes skills/ux-gremlin/scripts/ux-gremlin.mjs as the plugin bin.
plugins/ux-gremlin/skills/ux-gremlin/scripts/ux-gremlin.mjs contains commandIngest, normalizeReport, renderMarkdownReport, renderHtmlReport, and commandReport.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: The implementation could split behavior across the wrong artifacts or require new plugin infrastructure.
assumptions.decision: Implement the feature in ux-gremlin.mjs and existing plugin tests/docs.

assumptions.statement: The existing results contract stores screenshots and traces as string arrays and can be extended with evidence_artifacts without breaking current consumers.
assumptions.verification_method: Read results schema, results template/example, validator, and report normalization code.
evidence: plugins/ux-gremlin/skills/ux-gremlin/schemas/ux-gremlin-results.schema.json defines screenshots and traces as arrays of strings and allows additional properties.
validateResults currently checks screenshots and traces as string arrays.
normalizeReport preserves per-scenario screenshots and traces and aggregates them into report.evidence.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: A schema change could break existing reports or ingested results.
assumptions.decision: Preserve screenshots/traces and add optional evidence_artifacts as a compatible extension.

assumptions.statement: Playwright JSON reporter evidence is represented as per-result attachments that can be copied locally when an attachment path exists.
assumptions.verification_method: Use Playwright JSON reporter shape documented in the current fixture conventions and cover attachment handling with a regression test.
evidence: The implementation will add a fixture test with result.attachments entries containing name/contentType/path and assert copied evidence files.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Ingest could silently miss evidence attachments or fail to copy artifacts from real Playwright output.
assumptions.decision: Collect attachments from every Playwright test result attempt and validate the expected shape with tests.

assumptions.statement: Evidence links can be rendered safely by linking only local .agent/evidence paths and escaping labels and href attributes in Markdown and HTML.
assumptions.verification_method: Read current escaping behavior and add malicious artifact-name regression coverage.
evidence: renderHtmlReport already escapes dynamic text through escapeHtml and has an existing test that rejects raw <script> output.
The implementation will add tests for quote/script-containing evidence names and for relative links into .agent/evidence.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: Reports could introduce HTML injection or unsafe file links from untrusted result text.
assumptions.decision: Render links through dedicated local-evidence helpers and keep non-evidence strings as escaped text.

final_verification.notes: UX Gremlin evidence copying, linked reports, static HTML readability, docs, metadata, package validation, marketplace sync, and guardrail checks passed.
